center.name: 阿特拉托河
center.summary: 阿特拉托河是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括黑颈冠叫鸭，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The northern screamer is found across northern Colombia from the Atrato River and Magdalena River valleys east into the Lake Maracaibo area of Venezuela

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The northern screamer is found across northern Colombia from the Atrato River and Magdalena River valleys east into the Lake Maracaibo area of Venezuela
